title: I'm Buying These 3 Resilient Stocks During a Bear Market
text: In very different ways, these three businesses could help you beat the bear market.

title: Texas Pacific Land Corporation Sets Dates for Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE: TPL) (the “Company” or “TPL”) announced today that the Company will release third quarter 2022 financial results after the market closes on Wednesday, November 2, 2022.

title: Can Texas Pacific Land Corp. Continue its Meteoric Rise?
text: With energy the only sector with a 2022 gain, Texas Pacific Land Corporation is a price leader in a little-known slice of the overall oil-and-gas industry.
